dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7320 IH: Minnesota Voter Integrity Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Stauber (for himself, Mr. Finstad, Mr. Emmer, and Mrs. Fischbach) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on House Administration

form.official-title: To prohibit the provision of funding to the State of Minnesota until certain reporting requirements pertaining to voting are satisfied.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Minnesota Voter Integrity Act of 2026.

None of the funds authorized to be made available under the Help America Vote Act of 2002 may be made available to the State of Minnesota until the Minnesota Secretary of State submits to the Attorney General the following information:

paragraph.text: All records supporting or documenting same-day voter registrations, as authorized under Minn. Stat. 201.061, Subd. 3.
All records for the votes cast by voters registered under Minn. Stat. 201.061, Subd. 3.
All records kept under Minn. Stat. 201.01, Subds. 7 and 8.
Any other records the Attorney General determines to be relevant to compliance with requirements under the Help America Vote Act of 2002.
